app.help: Sayane — persona and context portability for LLMs.
group.mcp: MCP Server tools and stdio server.
group.storage: Storage: Obsidian import/export, context index, Git.
error.profile_not_found: Profile not found: {path}. Run `sayane init` first.
error.bridge_localhost: Bridge must bind to localhost only
error.obsidian_vault_required: Provide an Obsidian vault path or set SAYANE_OBSIDIAN_VAULT to an existing directory
export.title: # Sayane Compiled Prompt
import.no_candidates: No differences found. Bundle content matches stored context.
serve.auth_hint: Use Authorization: Bearer <token> for protected endpoints
candidate.level0: Level 0: schema validation occurs on candidate load; use --level 1+.
storage.package_preview_only: Preview only. No profile has been modified and no candidates were persisted.
storage.package_queued: Queued {count} candidate(s) from package into the review queue.
error.storage_git_filesystem_only: Git commit is only available with the filesystem backend
error.storage_legacy_external_confirmati: storage {action} is a legacy external integration path. Re-run with --legacy-compatible to confirm.
error.storage_package_verification_faile: Package verification failed. Review the preview output and fix the package before import.
error.storage_package_bundle_missing: Package is missing a context bundle artifact.
error.storage_package_bundle_invalid: Package context bundle is missing or invalid.
error.storage_package_queue_contract: Package does not permit this explicit review-queue import workflow.
